textByHashes.22e5cb249bdc6043d7e93327fe71db4de267b281: Well met, fellow adventurer! How can I help you?
textByHashes.0ae7beb868361162925b827c1141dad185fb8c9c: How frightfully rude of me, my dear chap. My name is Eniola and I work for that most excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.
textByHashes.ca9d9fc4f74c84d00442fa99b4d823a5f692878b: How frightfully rude of me, my dear lady. My name is Eniola and I work for that most excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.
textByHashes.2178fe5768fdd265951a756ee5f6099ec1c0b9ce: My presence here is the start of a new enterprise of travelling banks.
textByHashes.78c2538be25ad888be345f838b618c89039bea57: I, and others like me, will provide you with the convenience of having banking facilities where they will be of optimum use to you.
textByHashes.7155c8549ce23f14d2268f1c4c677c874ad21b83: The Z.M.I., that is, the Zamorakian Magical Institute, requested my services upon discovery of this altar. We at the Bank of Gielinor are a neutral party and are willing to offer our services regardless of affiliation.
textByHashes.ffcb88448ea23f6488d0f85ef59ffdef309b00e4: So that is why I am here.
textByHashes.764fc985cbd99b9e630e9a8cc712701323b3bd21: However, I must inform you that because the Z.M.I. are paying for my services, they require anyone not part of the Institute to pay an access fee to open their bank account.
textByHashes.2443a1ed9a990d43f475eb69ec0f9ec9f9ca78c3: But, as our goal as travelling bankers is to make our customers' lives more convenient, we have accomodated to your needs. We know you will be busy creating runes and do not wish to carry money with you. The
textByHashes.e84411b9134f61f9f015bc57cfa1533b08fab62a: charge to open your account is the small amount of twenty of one type of rune. The type of rune is up to you.
textByHashes.f93f540435de6cb6d3bbab22a62759fa83df9b08: Would you like to pay the price of twenty runes to open your bank account?
textByHashes.aa790a90fb01ef71f189987bb05a495d203a5822: It's not that I don't trust you, old chap, but as the old adage goes: 'Payment comes before friends.'
textByHashes.95b48bbf37f97db6bc8d009cfead7ecec109c3a3: It's not that I don't trust you, old girl, but as the old adage goes: 'Payment comes before friends.'
textByHashes.31237678fac57d5b58a4a9769f1e4bbdd32d150d: I'm sorry to hear that, sir. If you should reconsider, because I believe this service offers excellent value for money, do not hesitate to contact me.
textByHashes.87f8d3e9bcff83ba29d375c2cbea9dffd41ade4f: I'm sorry to hear that, madam. If you should reconsider, because I believe this service offers excellent value for money, do not hesitate to contact me.
textByHashes.309f010321c0ea07465525de5429e40b667e5de6: Oh that is most wonderful you know. Let me know which rune you would like to set up a quick payment with.
textByHashes.e2a15e5102e78d2218d449f1a56d9fd556fbc944: Very well! Whenever you use my services in future, I will take twenty of your lovely runes! Assuming you have enough of course!
textByHashes.45d9bc63c428c2bb81ad03dda1eaeef41a200d45: I will simply ask you to select a payment the old fashioned way my dear sir. To cancel, simply come talk to me again!
textByHashes.7ac92b304a1d8c27b0cd6044aa966f6dcac619b2: I will simply ask you to select a payment the old fashioned way my dear lady. To cancel, simply come talk to me again!
textByHashes.749b45e21976016ed66f23737e14ad3e8eda0d7c: Oh you are a silly one! You told me you wanted to pay with runes!
textByHashes.67fbf766157659c5872d75dcd72e0e2e2b0d4283: Would you like to cancel our deal ?
textByHashes.bb80d1713e3bbd29fc328009b48f0c4637c3762f: Very well, if you would like to set up another deal, just come ask me again.
textByHashes.506d3ef028abd1b27b9264e7600f0567866c0f32: I'm afraid you don't have the necessary runes with you at this time, so I can't allow you to access your account. Please bring twenty runes of one type and you can open your account.
